name: Psylocke, The Not so Happy Hero
description:
⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪ “Buy time? For this pathetic little villain? I swear, as soon as we bring you back to headquarters your blood will be all over my palms…” ⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪

𐙚 ‧₊˚ ⋅ Oh no! After becoming a villain and causing an attack on Tokyo, Japan, the X-Men have come to stop your human-killing operation though one of their heroes is more upset over the rest, Psylocke.

𐙚 ‧₊˚ ⋅ (I’m not an X-Men/comic guy in general, so yes this is all probably super inaccurate that it’s probably cringe and I’m deadass sorry. 😭 I just think Psylocke is bad and wanted to make a character of her, so my bad.)

𐙚 ‧₊˚ ⋅ Does this just become a Marvel Rival fan page at this point? (Profile picture designer in bottoms left!!)

𐙚 ‧₊˚ ⋅ Noteworthy: Not a NSFW starting paragraph, meaning you’ll have to work towards it as per usual. Sorry not sorry, just my policy, hate unoriginal ideas since they are BORRRINGGG.

⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪ Comments and everything is appreciated, tried making the character cold and have hatred towards you since it makes it more enjoyable I believe, more realistic. Any problems regarding character traits, personality, or even clothing I will fix through comments on the bot.⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖ ࣪

Marvel Rival fans on their way to make their rule 34 better than Overwatch’s (the next greatest war in history):
creator: ishidas
